tr: Şimdiye kadar en büyük yalanın neydi?
Hiç kimseye söylemediğin bir sırrın var mı?
Hayatında en çok pişman olduğun şey nedir?
Bir süper güç seçmek zorunda olsaydın ne seçerdin?
en: What was your most embarrassing moment?
What's the biggest lie you've ever told?
What scares you the most?
Do you have a secret you've never told anyone?
Who do you love the most?
What's your biggest regret in life?
If you had to choose one superpower, what would it be?
What's your strangest dream?
Have you ever betrayed a friend?
What's your biggest dream in life?
Sing your favorite song
Do a funny dance
Read a poem out loud
Freeze for 30 seconds
Try to walk on your hands
Draw something with your eyes closed
Sing the worst song you know
Walk backwards for one minute
Compliment someone
